title: Create: Lift n' Load |  Simulated/Aeronautics Addon
description: An addon for Aeronautics/Simulated that is inspired by Scrap Mechanic
body:
An addon for Aeronautics/Simulated that is inspired by Scrap Mechanic

### Current Features
- **Contraption Lift** – Move and position your creations  
- **Thruster** – Give your builds simple propulsion utilizing Burnable Fuel like Items/Fluids  
- **Physics Welder** – Slimeball but better including a bigger range  
- **Placeable Functional Wheels** – Allow Offroad Like Wheels to be placed & fully functional as a wheel that works in any direction pretty much  
- **Slime Wheel** – Similar to Wheels but allows to Stick to walls/ceilings  
- **Water Wheel Paddling** – Allow Water Wheels to Paddle through water  
- _More Planned Content Coming soon :3_
